settings_density_compact_desc: 24px row height — fits more rows on screen
settings_sourceview_desc_junctions: Directory junctions on Windows. WBPP-friendly, no admin privileges required. Only works on the same volume.
settings_sourceview_desc_symlinks: POSIX-style symlinks. Cross-platform, cross-volume. May require admin/developer mode on Windows.
settings_sourceview_desc_hardlinks: Same-volume file links sharing an inode. Zero extra disk usage but cannot cross volume boundaries.
settings_sourceview_desc_copy: Duplicate every source file into the project tree. Maximum compatibility but uses significant disk space.
settings_advanced_loglevel_info: Controls application log verbosity. Debug emits diagnostic detail; Info is the default; Warn and Error progressively quieter.
settings_advanced_firstrun_info: Walks you through setting up your first project.
settings_attribution_simbad_desc: On-demand resolution of designations, common names, coordinates, object types, and aliases.
settings_attribution_seed_desc: The bundled seed index of popular NGC/IC and named objects.
settings_catalogue_default_info: Show {label} objects by default in the Planner catalogue filter.
settings_cleanup_route_info: Routes all destructive operations through archive or trash workflows instead of immediate permanent deletion.
settings_cleanup_protection_info: Sets the starting protection level for newly ingested sources; protected sources are skipped by cleanup plans unless explicitly approved.
settings_ingestion_scan_info: Scan all roots each time the application opens.
settings_ingestion_symlinks_info: Follow symlinks during filesystem scans. Disabled by default to prevent scan loops.
settings_ingestion_junctions_info: Follow NTFS directory junctions on Windows. Enable if your library uses junctions for external drives.
settings_ingestion_hashing_info: Lazy defers hashing until a feature needs it (e.g. duplicate detection). Eager hashes every file on first scan. Off disables hashing entirely.
settings_naming_dest_info: Destination folder pattern for this frame type, applied when confirming inbox items. Empty = use the built-in default (shown as placeholder).
settings_resolver_online_on_info: Targets not in the bundled seed or local cache are resolved on demand from SIMBAD, then cached.
settings_resolver_online_off_info: Online resolution is off — only the bundled seed and local cache are used. Unknown objects are marked unresolved.
settings_resolver_tapurl_info: The CDS TAP service URL queried for long-tail resolution.
settings_resolver_debounce_info: How long to wait after typing before querying SIMBAD.
settings_resolver_timeout_info: How long to wait for a SIMBAD response before giving up.
settings_pane_sources_desc: Library roots the app indexes. Files are read in read-only mode; nothing is modified outside an approved plan.
settings_pane_equipment_desc: Cameras, telescopes, and optical trains used across your sessions.
settings_pane_ingestion_desc: Controls how the app scans source folders and groups newly discovered files.
settings_pane_naming_desc: Token patterns used when files are confirmed from Inbox to Inventory.
settings_pane_tools_desc: Configure executable paths and directory templates for each processing tool.
settings_pane_cal_desc: Tolerances and requirements for automatic calibration frame matching.
settings_pane_catalogs_desc: How object names in your files are resolved to canonical targets — online SIMBAD resolution plus the bundled seed and local cache.
settings_pane_planner_desc: Observation planning preferences — altitude threshold and filter visibility settings for the Planner table.
settings_pane_cleanup_desc: Default actions for each data type when a cleanup plan is generated after processing.
settings_pane_source_views_desc: Default link kind used when generating a per-project source view for PixInsight/WBPP.
settings_pane_general_desc: Theme, font size, and display density.
settings_pane_advanced_desc: Logging level, database information, and reset options.
settings_pane_audit_desc: Searchable history of every state change, plan application, and system event.
archive_no_match: No archived items match the current filters.
archive_reveal_unavailable_title: Reveal isn't available yet — the archive location isn't exposed by the backend.
archive_empty_desc: Projects appear here after they're archived.
archive_delete_permanently_confirm_desc: This permanently deletes the archived files for {name}. Type DELETE to confirm — this cannot be undone.
calibration_ambiguous_hint: Multiple sessions at similar confidence — review before assigning.
calibration_compatible_sessions_no_ancho: This master has no matched acquisition sessions yet.
calibration_compatible_sessions_no_selec: This master isn't assigned to a session yet, so there's nothing to match against.
calibration_compatible_sessions_none_des: No acquisition sessions matched this master's fingerprint. Adjust tolerances in Settings → Calibration.
calibration_empty_desc: Run a scan to import calibration frames.
calibration_observer_missing_guard: Observer location or acquisition time is missing — cannot suggest calibration masters.
calibration_observer_missing_match: Observer location or acquisition time is missing — cannot match this master to sessions.
calibration_rotation_deviation: Rotation differs by {deg}° — flat may not be valid for these lights.
calibration_select_master_desc: Select a master to view its details.
calibration_session_mixed_state: Session is mixed (light + dark frames). Split it before requesting calibration suggestions.
cmdk_no_results: No results for "{query}". Try a different search term.
err_alias_duplicate: That alias already exists for this target.
err_alias_not_found: That alias could not be found.
err_classification_ambiguous: This file could be more than one type — confirm how to classify it.
err_classification_stale: This classification is out of date. Re-scan to refresh it.
err_database_error: Couldn't read from the local database. Please try again.
err_dev_mode_disabled: This developer feature is turned off.
err_equipment_duplicate: This equipment is already in your library.
err_equipment_not_found: That equipment could not be found.
err_file_not_found: That file could not be found.
err_filesystem_destination_exists: Something already exists at the destination.
err_firstrun_incomplete: Finish the initial setup before using this feature.
err_frame_not_found: That frame could not be found.
err_framing_merge_duplicate_id: The same framing was selected more than once to merge in.
err_framing_merge_requires_two: Merging needs at least one other framing to fold in.
err_framing_not_found: That framing could not be found.
err_framing_project_mismatch: That framing doesn't belong to this project.
err_framing_reassign_empty_selection: Choose at least one session to reassign.
err_framing_split_empty_selection: Choose at least one session to split out.
err_framing_split_invalid_session: That session isn't a member of this framing.
err_framing_split_would_empty_source: Splitting must leave at least one session in the original framing.
err_generic_fallback: Something went wrong. Please try again.
err_hash_mismatch: That file doesn't match the missing frame, so it wasn't relinked.
err_inbox_destination_root_required: A destination library is required for this move.
err_inbox_has_open_plan: This item already has an open plan. Review or cancel it first.
err_inbox_item_no_plan: There's no plan for this item yet.
err_inbox_item_not_found: That inbox item could not be found.
err_inbox_missing_path_attributes: This item is missing the details needed to plan a move.
err_inbox_no_destination_root: Choose a destination library before continuing.
err_internal_audit: Couldn't record this action to the history log. Please try again.
err_internal_data: Some stored data couldn't be read. Please try again.
err_internal_database: Couldn't reach the local database. Please try again.
err_io_error: A file read/write error occurred. Please try again.
err_item_not_failed: This item hasn't failed, so it can't be retried.
err_item_not_found: That item could not be found.
err_item_not_pending: This item is no longer pending.
err_lifecycle_last_confirmed_source: You can't remove the last confirmed source.
err_lifecycle_read_only: This item is read-only and can't be changed.
err_macos_quarantine_detected: macOS has quarantined this app. Approve it in System Settings, then try again.
err_name_duplicate: That name is already in use.
err_no_items_to_retry: There are no items to retry.
err_note_content_too_large: This note is too long. Please shorten it.
err_parent_not_found: The parent item could not be found.
err_parent_not_terminal: The parent isn't in a final state yet.
err_path_already_registered_different_ki: This directory is registered under a different category
err_path_collision: A file or folder with that name already exists here.
err_path_not_directory: This path is not a directory
err_path_permission_denied: Cannot read this directory — check permissions
err_path_reserved_name: That name is reserved by the operating system. Choose another.
err_path_traversal: That path points outside the allowed location.
err_path_write_denied: Couldn't write to that location — check permissions.
err_pattern_empty: The naming pattern can't be empty.
err_pattern_invalid_unicode: The naming pattern contains characters that aren't allowed.
err_pattern_unset: No naming pattern is set yet.
err_picker_unavailable: The file picker isn't available right now.
err_plan_approval_required: Approve the plan before applying it.
err_plan_approval_stale: The plan changed since you reviewed it. Review it again.
err_plan_blocked_by_protection: This plan is blocked by a protected item. Resolve the protection first.
err_plan_conflict_overlap: Another plan is currently working on the same files or folders. Wait for it to finish, then try again.
err_plan_invalid_state: This plan can't be used in its current state.
err_plan_items_empty: This plan has no items to apply.
err_plan_not_found: That plan could not be found.
err_plan_not_in_apply: This plan isn't being applied right now.
err_plan_required: This action needs a plan first.
err_project_not_found: That project could not be found.
err_project_read_only: This project is read-only and can't be changed.
err_root_has_dependents: This source still has related records (sessions, plan items, or inbox items) and can't be deleted.
err_root_unavailable: That library root isn't available right now. Check that its drive is connected.
err_run_not_found: That run could not be found.
err_serialise_error: Couldn't prepare the data for export. Please try again.
err_session_mixed_state: This selection mixes sessions in different states.
err_session_not_found: That session could not be found.
err_source_invalid_organization_state: This source isn't in a state that allows that change.
err_source_not_found: That source could not be found.
err_state_corrupted: Some saved progress was reset due to a data issue. Please try again.
err_target_not_found: That target could not be found.
err_frameset_not_found: That light group could not be found.
err_pointing_unavailable: No reliable sky position is available for this light group.
err_candidate_invalid: That target candidate could not be confirmed.
err_token_unknown: The pattern uses a token that isn't recognised.
err_transition_refused: That change isn't allowed right now.
err_validation_request_envelope_invalid: The app sent a malformed request. Please try again.
err_view_mixed_kind: This selection mixes different kinds of items.
err_view_not_found: That view could not be found.
err_view_unsupported_kind: This kind of item isn't supported here.
err_no_selection: This project has no selected light frames to generate a source view from.
err_no_link_kind: No usable link method is available on this filesystem. Allow copying to proceed instead.
err_destination_collision: Two sources would end up at the same destination path. Review the layout before retrying.
err_destination_exists: A file or folder already exists at the destination — nothing was overwritten.
err_profile_not_found: That processing profile could not be found.
err_item_still_stale: That file has changed since this plan was approved. Re-check it, then try resuming again.
err_volume_still_unavailable: That drive still isn't available. Reconnect it, then try resuming again.
err_disk_still_full: There still isn't enough free space to resume. Free up space, then try again.
inbox_archive_hint: Archive keeps a recoverable copy; Trash is unrecoverable.
inbox_choose_dest_root_body: More than one library root can host {category} frames. Pick where these files should go to generate the plan.
inbox_cone_search_no_pointing: No reliable sky position is available for this light group.
inbox_cone_search_confirmed: Confirmed as this light group's target.
inbox_frame_types_required_body: No IMAGETYP headers could be read. Assign frame types below, then confirm.
inbox_mixed_folder_body: Multiple frame types detected. Confirm to produce a reviewable split plan.
inbox_required_metadata_body: {count} files missing required attribute(s) for their destination — confirm disabled. Assign the missing value(s) in “Needs review” above, then confirm.
inbox_select_item_prompt: Select an item to see the classification breakdown.
inbox_stale_plan_warning: Source files changed — discard and re-confirm to regenerate this plan.
inbox_where_source_files_go: Where should removed source files go?
projects_calib_assign_hint: To assign calibration masters, open the Calibration page and select the appropriate master.
projects_create_desc: Set up a project to collect and organize acquisition sessions.
projects_detail_channel_drift: New sources added since last channel review.
projects_edit_archived_notice: This project is archived. Settings are read-only.
projects_edit_drift_banner: New sources were added since the last channel review.
projects_edit_tool_locked_hint: Tool is locked in the current lifecycle state ({lifecycle}).
projects_edit_sources_add_empty: All sessions are already linked to this project.
projects_relaunch_body: {tool} may already be open for this project. Open another instance?
projects_source_views_empty: No generated source views for this project.
projects_source_views_kind_mismatch: Kind mismatch detected. Resolve this manually before removing or regenerating.
projects_wizard_add_flat_btn: + Add another flat (for a future filter)
projects_wizard_after_process: Process there; outputs are observed on refresh.
projects_wizard_after_record: Record final outputs back here when done.
projects_wizard_aging_bias_warn: ⚠ aging bias master — soft mismatch in plan
projects_wizard_calib_desc: Map calibration to each light source. Flats are per-filter (Ha flats can only calibrate Ha lights). Darks & bias are usually shared across all lights of the same exposure / camera / gain.
projects_wizard_flats_subtitle: one master flat per filter; light sources are auto-grouped by filter
projects_wizard_footprint_note: plan will create directories + manifest only · no light frames are copied
projects_wizard_review_safe_desc: This plan only creates directories, junctions, and the project manifest. No source frames are moved, copied, or modified.
projects_wizard_shared_calib_title: Shared calibration — applies to all lights matching the fingerprint
projects_wizard_strategy_fallback_note: If a fallback is needed (e.g. across volumes), the plan will indicate per item.
projects_wizard_strategy_ntfs_meta: ~12 KB on disk · no admin · cleanup-safe
projects_wizard_subbar_note: Sources are selected here; the filesystem plan is shown at step 6 before anything is created.
projects_wizard_views_desc: A source view is a tool-friendly projection of your source map. PixInsight/WBPP will read source files through this view. The strategy is preset from
projects_wizard_views_hint: for mosaic projects, one view per panel; otherwise a single wbpp_input
projects_wizard_why_bias_val: : only g100 bias for this camera exists; soft mismatch on age
projects_wizard_why_dark_val: : exact match on EXPTIME (300s) · temp Δ 0.1°C · gain 100
projects_wizard_why_flats_val: : matched per filter; same camera; flats < 30d old preferred
sessions_no_match: No sessions match the current filters.
sessions_reveal_title: Open the session's source location in the OS file browser
sessions_select_desc: Select a session to view its details.
settings_advanced_danger_desc: Resets all UI preferences (theme, density, font size) to defaults. Library roots, equipment, and session data are not affected.
settings_attribution_note: PlateVault identifies targets using the following astronomical data sources. We gratefully acknowledge their work.
settings_auditlog_export_aria: Export audit events to a file
settings_calmatch_dark_bias_age_aria: Dark and bias age limit in days
settings_calmatch_help: Toggle a field off to exclude it from matching (e.g. ignore gain). Soft/warn fields never block a match — they only lower confidence.
settings_calmatch_sensor_temp_aria: Sensor temperature tolerance in degrees Celsius
settings_cleanup_pertype_desc: Protected categories are set to a destructive action: {types}. These are costly to reacquire — confirm this is intentional.
settings_datasources_delete_confirm_desc: "{path}" will no longer be tracked. Files on disk are never touched — this only removes the registration.
settings_datasources_disable_confirm_des: The source will be excluded from scans and ingest until re-enabled. Its history is kept.
settings_datasources_empty: No source folders registered yet. Add one above.
settings_datasources_remap_all_verified: All sample files were found at the new path.
settings_datasources_remap_not_all_verif: Some sample files were not found at the new path. Review the samples below before applying.
settings_equipment_delete_in_use: Cannot remove — still used by an optical train. Remove or edit that train first.
settings_ingestion_hashing_eager: Eager — hash every file on first scan
settings_naming_auto_apply: Auto-apply pattern to new projects without confirmation
settings_naming_warn_no_path_sep: No path separator (/) — all tokens resolve to one flat folder.
settings_observing_sites_empty: No observing sites yet. Add one to see real tonight altitude, visibility, and imaging time for your targets.
settings_observing_sites_error_latitude: Latitude must be a number between -90 and 90.
settings_observing_sites_error_longitude: Longitude must be a number between -180 and 180.
settings_observing_sites_error_elevation: Elevation must be a number (in metres).
settings_observing_sites_error_horizon: Minimum horizon altitude must be a number between 0 and 90.
settings_observing_sites_delete_confirm_: This removes the site from your observing-site list. If it was the default or active site, another site (or none) takes its place.
settings_planner_altitude_info: Minimum elevation above the horizon, in degrees, for the Planner's "Visible tonight" and "Imaging time" columns (default {deg}°).
settings_planner_moon_avoidance_info: Per-band Moon-avoidance thresholds that drive the Planner's filter guidance pills tonight — higher distance/width settings make a band more Moon-sensitive.
settings_planner_moon_avoidance_distance: {band} required separation at full Moon, in degrees
settings_resolver_cache_clear_error: Could not clear the resolve cache: {error}
settings_resolver_cache_clear_info: Clearing the local SIMBAD lookup cache never deletes a saved target — it re-warms automatically from the bundled seed.
settings_resolver_cache_clear_success: Resolve cache cleared — re-warming in the background.
settings_source_protect_hint_normal: {prefix}Standard plan review applies; no extra acknowledgement required.
settings_source_protect_hint_protected: {prefix}Cleanup plans require explicit approval for this source's files.
settings_source_protect_hint_unprotected: {prefix}Destructive plan actions proceed without additional confirmation.
setup_config_default_protection_desc: Protection level applied to newly added source folders. Protected sources are skipped by cleanup plans unless explicitly approved.
setup_config_display_density_desc: How compact the interface is — affects row heights and spacing across the app.
setup_confirm_blocked: Cannot complete setup: missing required folder types — {kinds}. Go back to Step 1 to add them.
setup_confirm_next_roots: Your selected folders are registered as library roots.
setup_confirm_next_scan: An initial scan runs after setup, reading file headers to build the index.
setup_confirm_next_sessions: Light frames are grouped into acquisition sessions.
setup_confirm_no_folders: No folders configured (you can add them later in Settings).
setup_confirm_safe_body: The scan only reads file headers and builds an index — your files stay exactly where they are.
setup_scan_no_sources: No sources registered. Go back and add at least one folder.
setup_scan_summary_empty: No folders detected. You can add more sources in Settings.

match.pp=one: {count} folder detected across all sources. Head to the Inbox to review and approve.
match.pp=other: {count} folders detected across all sources. Head to the Inbox to review and approve.

setup_sources_intro: Add the folders where your data lives. At least one folder is required for each required type below; raw files are never moved or copied.
setup_sources_org_state_title: Already organized = files stay in place (catalogue only). Needs organizing = files will be moved to a library structure on confirm.
setup_step_config_desc: Set a few defaults now — you can change all of these later in Settings.
setup_step_confirm_desc: Review your configuration before starting the initial scan.
setup_step_site_desc: Add your observing location so the Targets Planner can show real tonight altitude, visibility, and imaging time.
setup_site_intro: Optional — add one observing site now, or skip and add it later from Settings → Target Planner.
setup_site_map_unavailable: Map unavailable right now — enter your coordinates in the fields below.
setup_site_skip_note: You can leave this blank and set it up later; the Planner will prompt you when it's needed.
setup_step_scan_desc: Scanning each source folder and detecting ingestion groups.
setup_step_sources_desc: Add the folders where your light frames, calibration frames, projects, and incoming captures are stored.
setup_step_tools_desc: Configure the astrophotography processing tools installed on your system.
setup_tools_intro: Configure your processing tools so the app can prepare project inputs and suggest workflow profiles. Installed tools are detected automatically; you can override or set a path manually.
setup_tools_pixinsight_desc: Advanced image processing and analysis platform
setup_tools_skip_note: You can skip this step. Tool configuration can be changed later in Settings.
shell_error_body: Something failed to render. Reload the view, or restart the app if it keeps happening.
targets_add_target_desc: Search for an astronomical target to add it to your library.
targets_add_resolve_failed: Could not resolve target "{query}". Try a different name.
targets_detail_alias_not_found: Alias not found on this target.
targets_detail_alias_not_removable: Only user-added aliases can be removed.
targets_detail_notes_placeholder: Add observing notes for this target…
targets_legacy_select_desc: Choose a target from the list to view its details.
targets_page_my_targets_no_favs: No favourites yet. Star a target (☆) to add it here.
targets_page_my_targets_no_match: No favourites match the current filters.
targets_page_no_match: No catalog targets match the current filters.
targets_opposition_unknown_title: Opposition date unknown — this target has no coordinates.
targets_table_no_match: No targets match the current filters.
guided_step_inbox_body: Select a folder in your Inbox and click Confirm to move it into Inventory.
guided_step_project_body: Click "+ New project" to create a project from your confirmed inventory items.
guided_step_tool_title: Open your project in a processing tool
guided_step_tool_body: Click "Open in {tool}" to prepare your project for processing.
inbox_toast_plan_created: Plan created ({count} items). Review below before applying.
inbox_toast_invalid_destination_root: That destination root is not valid.
inbox_toast_no_destination_root: No library root is registered for this frame type.
inbox_toast_choose_dest_root: Choose a destination library root to generate the plan.
inbox_toast_missing_path_attrs: Some files are missing required attributes. Assign the missing values in the file list, then confirm again.
inbox_toast_has_open_plan: An open plan already exists for this item.
inbox_toast_stale_classification: Folder changed since classification — rescan to refresh.
inbox_toast_bulk_partial: {success} confirmed; {fail} skipped (mixed, missing metadata, or needs root pick).
inbox_toast_bulk_all_need_review: Bulk confirm: all items need review (mixed folders or missing metadata).
inbox_toast_plan_discarded: Plan discarded. Item is available for re-confirmation.
projects_toast_plan_required: A filesystem plan is required before this transition. Create or approve a plan first.
projects_archive_generate_failed: Could not generate the archive plan.
projects_toast_archived_readonly: This project is archived. Notes cannot be edited.
projects_wizard_toast_created_folders: Project "{name}" created — project folders created on disk.
projects_wizard_toast_folders_failed: Project "{name}" created, but folder creation failed. The folder plan remains available for review.
projects_source_views_removal_toast: Removal plan created. Review and apply plan to complete removal.
projects_source_views_regen_unresolved: ({count} unresolved references — review plan before applying)
projects_source_views_regen_toast: Regeneration plan created{warning}. Review and apply to rebuild the view.
projects_source_views_generate_kind_hint: Link kind (symlink/hardlink/junction) is resolved automatically from your Source Views settings and this filesystem's capability. Nothing is copied by default.
projects_source_views_generate_kind_drif: If a configured kind isn't achievable on this filesystem, a documented fallback is applied automatically and shown as a plan warning (Developer Mode surfaces the filesystem capability probe).
projects_source_views_generate_copy_opt_: Allow copying files if no link is possible on this filesystem
projects_source_views_generate_toast: Generation plan created (linked, not copied){warning}. Review and apply to create the view.
projects_source_views_generate_toast_cop: Generation plan created (copy fallback — no link kind was achievable){warning}. Review and apply to create the view.
projects_source_views_verify_clean: Clean — every link resolves to a present source. Safe to process.
projects_source_views_verify_broken_summ: {count} broken item(s) found. No files were changed — regenerate the view to repair.
projects_source_views_history_empty: No removal or regeneration plans yet.
projects_tool_cwd_anchored_hint: {tool} doesn't accept a folder to open — its working directory is anchored to the project instead.
projects_create_name_duplicate: A project with this name already exists.
projects_schema_name_too_long: Name must be {max} characters or fewer.
projects_schema_notes_too_long: Notes must be {max} characters or fewer.
logpanel_history_gap: History gap — some entries older than this point are no longer retained.
logpanel_history_gap_count: History gap — {count} entries older than this point are no longer retained.
plans_may_proceed: You may proceed with plan execution.
plans_review_acknowledge: Review and acknowledge each protected item below before running the plan.
settings_advanced_guided_completed: The guided flow has been completed. Restart to replay it from the beginning.
settings_advanced_guided_dismissed: The guided flow is currently dismissed. Restart to resume from your last position.
settings_advanced_firstrun_restart_desc: Reopens the source setup wizard, pre-filled with your current Raw, Calibration, Project, and Inbox folders, so you can add, remove, or correct them.
settings_advanced_firstrun_restart_confi: This reopens the source setup wizard and clears its completed status. Your existing sources will be pre-filled for you to review and adjust — nothing is deleted.
settings_resolver_online_desc: Targets not in the bundled seed or local cache are resolved on demand from SIMBAD, then cached.
settings_resolver_offline_desc: Online resolution is off — only the bundled seed and local cache are used. Unknown objects are marked unresolved.
targets_col_visible_title: Visible tonight above usable altitude threshold
targets_col_lunar_title: Angular separation from the Moon tonight
targets_planner_no_site_banner: Add an observing site in Settings to see tonight's real altitude, visibility, and imaging time for your targets.
targets_guidance_unknown_title: Filter guidance unavailable — this target has no catalogued coordinates.
targets_guidance_explain_moon: Moon tonight: {phase}, {pct}% illuminated, {age} days from full
targets_guidance_explain_separation: This target: {deg}° from the Moon tonight
targets_guidance_explain_unknown: No catalogued coordinates for this target — filter guidance cannot be computed.
targets_planner_site_prompt_desc: Add a default observing location so the planner can compute the Moon, lunar distances, and the best imaging season for tonight.
targets_col_best_date_title: Date the target transits at local midnight — the best time of year to image it
targets_best_date_unknown_title: Best imaging date unknown — this target has no coordinates.
targets_table_no_dark_window_title: No dark window tonight (imaging time is zero, not a low-altitude issue).
targets_lunar_unknown_title: Lunar distance unknown — this target has no coordinates.
settings_source_views_intra_drive_info: Link kind used when a source and the generated view live on the same volume.
settings_source_views_cross_drive_info: Link kind used when a source and the generated view live on different volumes. Hardlink is never offered here — hardlinks cannot cross volumes.
settings_source_views_drift_note: If the configured kind isn't achievable on a given filesystem, a documented fallback is applied automatically at generation time and reported as a plan warning (Developer Mode surfaces the filesystem capability probe).
inbox_apply_plan_live_aria: Apply plan for {name} with live progress
targets_imgtime_zero_darkness_title: No imaging time — the night never gets dark enough at this site and date
targets_imgtime_zero_altitude_title: No imaging time — the target never clears {threshold}° during darkness
targets_imgtime_zero_moon_title: No Moon-viable imaging time — the Moon blocks every filter band tonight; see the detail panel for per-band windows
targets_imgtime_moon_limited_title: Moon shortens tonight's imaging window for: {bands}

match.pp=one: Cleanup would review {count} candidate for archive or trash. Nothing is removed without explicit plan approval.
match.pp=other: Cleanup would review {count} candidates for archive or trash. Nothing is removed without explicit plan approval.

settings_auditlog_detail_actor_not_autho: Automatic (system) transitions are only allowed for blocking, unblocking, or marking a project ready

match.pp=one: {count} field requires review before this transition
match.pp=other: {count} fields require review before this transition

settings_auditlog_detail_plan_required: Transition {fromState} → {toState} for {entityType} requires an approved filesystem plan
settings_auditlog_detail_target_user_ove: Target chosen by user override for query “{query}”
projects_stepper_next_ready: Prepare sources and calibration masters before processing.
projects_stepper_next_prepared: Open in processing tool to begin integration.
projects_stepper_next_processing: Record an accepted output to complete the project.
projects_stepper_next_completed: Review cleanup candidates to reclaim disk space.
projects_stepper_next_archived: Project is archived. Unarchive to resume work.
projects_create_err_name_too_long: Project name is too long (max 120 characters).
projects_create_err_path_collision: Another project already uses this folder path.
projects_edit_err_name_too_long: Name must be 120 characters or fewer.
projects_edit_err_tool_locked: Tool cannot be changed in the current lifecycle state.
projects_edit_err_read_only: This project is archived and cannot be edited.
projects_cleanup_category_protected_reas: {category} are protected and excluded from cleanup plans
dev_settings_intro: This page is intentionally unreachable from Settings or the command palette. It exists so a developer can turn on the diagnostics surface before anything else becomes visible.
dev_settings_toggle_info: When on, the recording proxy captures contract calls and Developer / Contracts becomes reachable from the command palette (Cmd+K / Ctrl+K).
dev_settings_restart_hint: Turning developer mode off here stops new contract calls from being recorded immediately, but the recording proxy itself is only fully removed after the app restarts.
projects_cleanup_scan_prompt: Scan this project to preview cleanup candidates. Scanning is read-only — nothing is removed without explicit plan approval.
projects_cleanup_no_candidates_desc: The cleanup policy keeps every data type, or no processing artifacts have been observed for this project.
projects_cleanup_row_protected_hint: Protected — requires explicit acknowledgement during plan review before it can be applied
projects_cleanup_dest_archive_hint: App-managed archive folder — reversible until you empty it
projects_cleanup_generate_failed: Could not generate the cleanup plan.
plans_review_no_mutation_note: Nothing has been changed on disk. Review every proposed item below; applying requires explicit approval.
plans_review_resume_stalled: Resume requested — execution has not restarted yet (known limitation). You can close this and check back later.
plans_review_retry_created_toast: Retry plan created — review it before applying.

match.pp=one: Archive plan created with {count} item — review before anything is moved.
match.pp=other: Archive plan created with {count} items — review before anything is moved.

match.pp=one: Cleanup plan created with {count} item — review before anything is applied.
match.pp=other: Cleanup plan created with {count} items — review before anything is applied.

inventory_reconcile_toast_summary: {present} present · {missing} newly missing · {recovered} recovered · {backfilled} sizes fixed
